stemHtml: Which of the following options contains information that you could find in a gridded dataset?

options.a: The gridded forecast models are still a prototype.
options.b: Flight level and temperature of the tropopause only.
options.c: Flight level and temperature of the tropopause, CB, turbulence, fog and icing.
options.d: Flight level and temperature of the tropopause, CB, turbulence, icing, W/V (Wind Velocity)
